settings.headline: Straight answers.
settings.intro: Pre-launch questions we get before someone joins early access.

settings.question: What is KULTIV?
settings.answer: A complete longevity nutrition system — built from soil and whole-food matrices upward, not synthetic stacks and noise.

settings.question: Is this a supplement brand?
settings.answer: No. We are building as a complete food system with published standards — not a single hero capsule.

settings.question: When do you launch?
settings.answer: We are in early access. Join the list to be first — United Kingdom and Germany first.

settings.question: What happens after I join the list?
settings.answer: You will get only high-signal updates: launch timing, science drops, and allocation. Unsubscribe anytime.
